Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <!--Generated by XML-WS Runtime (https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/metro-jax-ws). Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <definitions targetNamespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1" name="Geocoding" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:tns="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <types> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1" schemaLocation="http://ominet.aerosimo.com:8082/geocoding/ws/geocoding/v1?xsd=1"/> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="getGeocode"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getGeocode"/> </message> <message name="getGeocodeResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getGeocodeResponse"/> </message> <portType name="Geocoding"> <operation name="getGeocode"> <input wsam:Action="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1/Geocoding/getGeocodeRequest" message="tns:getGeocode"/> <output wsam:Action="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1/Geocoding/getGeocodeResponse" message="tns:getGeocodeResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="GeocodeBinding" type="tns:Geocoding"> <soap12:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <operation name="getGeocode"> <soap12:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap12:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="Geocoding"> <port name="Geocode" binding="tns:GeocodeBinding"> <soap12:address location="http://ominet.aerosimo.com:8082/geocoding/ws/geocoding/v1"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<!--Published by XML-WS Runtime (https://github.com/eclipse-ee4j/metro-jax-ws). Runtime's version is XML-WS Runtime 4.0.1 git-revision#298606e.--> <xs:schema version="1.0" targetNamespace="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1" xmlns:tns="https://aerosimo.com/api/ws/geocoding/v1" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="getGeocode" type="tns:getGeocode"/> <xs:element name="getGeocodeResponse" type="tns:getGeocodeResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="getGeocode"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="userID" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="encodedURL" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="addressType" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getGeocodeResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Status" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>
